answers.question: import.meta.hot API scope?
answers.answer: Full Vite-compatible API: accept, dispose, prune, invalidate, data. Enables third-party HMR plugins and full parity with Vite dev experience.
answers.impact: HMR client runtime must implement all 5 methods. Server-side must track module invalidation chains and support prune callbacks for cleanup.

answers.question: React Fast Refresh injection method?
answers.answer: AST-based in transform_tsx.rs. Inject $RefreshReg$ and $RefreshSig$ calls by analyzing the AST to find React component declarations and hooks usage.
answers.impact: transform_tsx.rs needs to detect function components (capitalized exports returning JSX), class components, and hook signatures. More code in the Rust transform layer but handles edge cases (HOCs, forwardRef, memo) correctly.
